belief: The test_line_total failure is a floating-point rounding bug in money.py: round_cents loses a cent under accumulation. The fix is to rewrite round_cents to use decimal.Decimal with ROUND_HALF_UP.
why_false: test_line_total never calls round_cents and imports nothing from money.py; the failure is 20 != 30, an off-by-one in orders.py::line_total. The on-screen test output contradicts the belief in one run.
